summary: Phase 1 UX Overhaul testing completed successfully. All login flows (Admin, RM, Customer, Venue Owner) working with correct redirects. Login page role selector displays 3-column grid correctly. Search page loads with filter sidebar. Venue detail page shows rounded corners on sidebar cards. Mobile responsive design working.

issues: React hydration warning for tr/tbody nesting - may cause issues in SSR

login_page_role_selector.details: Role selector has grid-cols-3 class, displays 3 role buttons (RM, Venue, Admin)

search_page_filter_sidebar.details: Filter sidebar visible with city/event/venue type filters, sidebar toggle button present

venue_detail_rounded_corners.details: CTA sidebar has rounded-xl class, all sidebar cards display with rounded corners

mobile_search_page.details: Mobile filter button present, venue cards render correctly with rounded corners

admin_dashboard_styling.details: Dashboard loads with summary cards and stat cards visible

header_navigation.details: Navigation links (Discover Venues, Weddings, Login) present and functional

critical_code_review_comments: RMDashboard.js has React hydration warning for invalid HTML nesting (<span> inside <tbody>). While functional, consider fixing for SSR compatibility.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 UX Overhaul complete. All 4 login flows verified working with correct redirects. Role selector fixed to 3-column grid. Rounded corners verified on VenuePublicPage sidebar cards. Search page and mobile view working. Backend tests created at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_phase1.py.
